mapper.sql: art.id, art.time_from, art.time_to, art.extend_time_flag, art.attribute1, art.attribute2, art.attribute3, art.enabled_flag, art.create_by, art.create_time, art.update_by, art.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.time_from as ${tAlias}_time_from, ${tAlias}.time_to as ${tAlias}_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend_time_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_regime_time (time_from, time_to, extend_time_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{timeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{timeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extendTimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_regime_time set time_from = #{timeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, time_to = #{timeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend_time_flag = #{extendTimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
